alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a phosphate group that is linked to exactly one alkyl chain.
alternative_parents.name: Monoalkyl phosphates

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
class.name: Organooxygen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as inositol phosphates. These are compounds containing a phosphate group attached to an inositol (or cyclohexanehexol) moiety.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a phosphate group attached to an inositol (or cyclohexanehexol) moiety.
direct_parent.name: Inositol phosphates

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic compounds containing an aliphatic ring substituted with at least one hydroxyl group.
intermediate_nodes.name: Cyclic alcohols and derivatives

intermediate_nodes.description: Compounds containing a cycloalkane moiety with one hydroxyl group on each of three or more ring atoms. These of also include derivatives where the hydrogen atom of one or more of the hydroxyl groups is replaced with another atom.
intermediate_nodes.name: Cyclitols and derivatives

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds in which at least one hydroxyl functional group (-OH) is bound to a carbon atom, usually connected to other carbon or hydrogen atoms.
subclass.name: Alcohols and polyols

superclass.description: Organic compounds that contain one or more oxygen atoms.
superclass.name: Organic oxygen compounds
